disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe, rapidly worsening right ear pain over the last 8-12 hours, refractory to maximum over-the-counter paracetamol, preventing sleep
trigger_question_examples: How bad is the pain and what have you tried for it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My right ear has been getting more and more painful over the last several hours. It's sharp and throbbing and I couldn't sleep. I've taken paracetamol as much as I can and it's barely helping.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick, yellowish purulent discharge from the affected ear
trigger_question_examples: Is there any discharge or fluid coming from the ear?
Have you noticed anything leaking from the ear?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, there's thick yellowish gunk coming out of that ear.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pain sharply worse on traction of the pinna and on pressure over the tragus
trigger_question_examples: Does it hurt more if you gently tug your outer ear or press the little flap at the front?
Is the pain worse when you touch the outside of the ear?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — if I pull on my ear or press that flap at the front it's a sharp stab of pain.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Blocked/full sensation with muffled conductive hearing loss on the affected side
trigger_question_examples: Does the ear feel blocked or is your hearing muffled?
How does your hearing feel on that side?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It feels completely blocked and my hearing is muffled on that side.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prodrome of itch in the ear canal 48 hours ago progressing to fullness and pressure, then severe pain; pain aggravated by jaw movement
trigger_question_examples: How did this start and how has it changed?
Does moving your jaw or chewing make it worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It started a couple of days ago as an itch deep in the ear, then it felt full and blocked, and now it's really painful — chewing makes it worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No subjective fever, chills, rigors or systemic toxicity
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers, chills or felt generally unwell?
Do you feel sick in yourself apart from the ear?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or chills, I don't feel sick in myself — it's just the ear that's the problem.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No diabetes, no immunosuppression, no prior ear surgery — background relevant to excluding invasive complication
trigger_question_examples: Do you have diabetes or any condition that weakens your immune system?
Any previous ear operations or ongoing ear problems?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No diabetes, nothing wrong with my immune system, and I've never had ear surgery.
